feedItems.description: allocated £8.1m to Environment & Streets (≈£57 per resident)
allocated £8.2m to Council Running Costs (≈£58 per resident)
allocated £3.7m to Adult Social Care (≈£26 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £109 (4.7%) to £2443
